tracks.meaning: a heavy soft gray metal (element Pb) used in batteries, pipes, radiation shielding, and formerly in paint and gasoline
to guide, direct, or manage a group, organization, or activity — to be in charge
being ahead of others in a race or competition — the advantage or margin by which someone is ahead
a piece of information or clue that helps in solving a crime or mystery
the main or starring role in a dramatic production, film, or theatrical show
the opening sentence or paragraph of a news story that summarizes the key information
a rope, chain, or strap used to control a dog or other animal
